mapper.insert: insert into t_wallet (user_id, balance, total_recharge, total_gift, total_consumed, frozen_amount, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{balance}, #{totalRecharge}, #{totalGift}, #{totalConsumed}, #{frozenAmount}, now())
mapper.update: update t_wallet set balance = balance + #{amount}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId}
update t_wallet set balance = balance - #{amount}, total_consumed = total_consumed + #{amount}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and balance >= #{amount}
mapper.insert: insert into t_wallet_log (user_id, type, amount, balance_before, balance_after, related_order_no, remark, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{balanceBefore}, #{balanceAfter}, #{relatedOrderNo}, #{remark}, now())
mapper.select: select log_id, user_id, type, amount, balance_before, balance_after, related_order_no, remark, create_time from t_wallet_log where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc, log_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into t_recharge_record (user_id, recharge_no, pay_amount, gift_amount, total_amount, template_id, pay_type, status, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{rechargeNo}, #{payAmount}, #{giftAmount}, #{totalAmount}, #{templateId}, #{payType}, #{status}, now())
mapper.select: select record_id, user_id, recharge_no, pay_amount, gift_amount, total_amount, template_id, pay_type, status, transaction_id, create_time, pay_time from t_recharge_record where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc
select template_id, pay_amount, gift_amount, total_amount, sort_order, status, create_time from t_recharge_template where status = 1 order by sort_order asc
select template_id, pay_amount, gift_amount, total_amount, sort_order, status, create_time from t_recharge_template order by sort_order asc
mapper.insert: insert into t_recharge_template (pay_amount, gift_amount, total_amount, sort_order, status, create_time) values (#{payAmount}, #{giftAmount}, #{totalAmount}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, now())
mapper.delete:
delete from t_recharge_template where template_id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select record_id, user_id, recharge_no, pay_amount, gift_amount, total_amount, template_id, pay_type, status, transaction_id, create_time, pay_time from t_recharge_record order by create_time desc
select log_id, user_id, type, amount, balance_before, balance_after, related_order_no, remark, create_time from t_wallet_log order by create_time desc, log_id desc
